title: Resolve Hardens Under Kaido’s Cruel War
description: On pages 10–13, this part focuses on Unknown person #9, Apoo, Luffy, Unknown person #10, Zoro, Kiku as The war turns cruel as Ice Oni spreads, Nami refuses to deny Luffy’s dream, Yamato defends Momonosuke, and Kaido’s forces tighten the battle.
scene: The war turns cruel as Ice Oni spreads, Nami refuses to deny Luffy’s dream, Yamato defends Momonosuke, and Kaido’s forces tighten the battle.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I'm a doctor!! And I'm obligated to save both allies and enemies alike!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: But until then, I need you to stay alive!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: So don't let that evil bastard get his way!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You went and said it, eh? Damn baggon!

dialogue.speaker: Apoo
dialogue.text: And you, Apoo!! You're a Disgrage!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: I'll end both of you bastards!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: I didn't come to Oniga- Shima...

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: I came here to cut down Kaido!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The one who is known as the strongest in the world!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: His rage caused an earth- quake!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: What did you just do, zero?! You're a frightening person!

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: Zoro, I under- stand why you're upset...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: "I saw /7 falling down the hole too.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: It'd be nice if I could just fly there, but...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: You guys are the main force.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Why are you still caught up on this floor!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: Is there anything I can help with?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: I wonder what this tremor is...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: Wait, no! I'm NOT scared at all!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Hmmm... I wonder. The terrain here is quite peculiar...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: Help!! This has never happened before!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: Let's pull away from Onigaashima for now!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: At this rate, we can't join the band@gasail

summary: This section advances the Wano - Resolve Under Kaido’s Rule storyline with 49 dialogue beats. The war turns cruel as Ice Oni spreads, Nami refuses to deny Luffy’s dream, Yamato defends Momonosuke, and Kaido’s forces tighten the battle.
